title: Who has the Spear of Cassius
display_title: Who has the Spear of Cassius
wikitext:
[]: Who has the Spear of Cassius             Quote Post by FeuerGolem » Sat Mar 03, 2018 4:29 pm My inictial idea has been proven wrong but maybe the spear is still stuck in eva-01?

[]: Re: Who has the Spear of Cassius             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 03, 2018 5:10 pm https://wiki.evageeks.org/Guides:Evange ... ocedure.3F

[]: Re: Who has the Spear of Cassius             Quote Post by FeuerGolem » Sat Mar 03, 2018 5:11 pm god damn it

[]: Re: Who has the Spear of Cassius             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 03, 2018 5:54 pm The Spear can't be stuck in Eva-01. We saw at the end of 2.0 that the Spear of Cassius is so powerful that it completely reverted Eva-01 to normal and put it into suspended animation. However, at the beginning of 3.0, Eva-01 temporarily activates and uses a laser attack on the Mark 4B. Later, Eva-01 is put in place as the Wunder's power reactor. Both of these things would have been impossible if the Spear were still in her. Kaworu expected to find the Spear of Cassius down in Central Dogma. While Kaworu's dialogue is not always straightforward, and it's quite possible he's misleading Shinji in certain ways, he is also the only source for certain kinds of exposition we currently have. Thus, taking what Kaworu says at face value unless it's firmly contradicted is probably the best move for now. So we must assume that the Spear of Cassius was removed from Eva-01 so it could be used against the Lilith/Mark.06/12th Angel amalgamation, and it later changed into a Spear of Longinus for reasons we can only speculate upon.

[]: Re: Who has the Spear of Cassius             Quote Post by anonymaus » Sat Mar 03, 2018 7:01 pm The fact that WILLE have a weapon modeled on on the spear of Cassius means they likely have (or had) it in their possession. Similar to SEELE using reproductions of the lance of Longinus. Rewatching that scene, it looks like they use a reproduction of the spear of Longinus as well. After Asuka uses the cassius-like heat lance she uses this longinus analogue to stab some biological part of the Wunder. https://i.imgur.com/a7q2l1D.jpg https://i.imgur.com/qWzasnw.jpg
